No Poverty.reason: The course content and objectives do not address any aspects of poverty, economic resources, or social protection systems.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course syllabus contains no information related to food security, nutrition, sustainable agriculture, or food production.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to 'promote physical and mental development and cultivate lifelong leisure sports,' which directly supports Target 3.4 by promoting mental health and well-being and preventing non-communicable diseases through physical activity.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also teaches relevant skills ('學得桌球基本技術') and promotes a sustainable lifestyle through 'lifelong leisure sports' (Target 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly designated as 'male and female co-ed,' directly ensuring equal participation and opportunity in sports for all genders, aligning with the principles of Target 5.1 and 5.5.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course syllabus provides no information related to consumption patterns, resource efficiency, waste reduction, or sustainable practices.

Life Below Water.reason: The course syllabus provides no information related to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or aquatic life.
